claim_summary: 23 total Carnegie units required for Georgia High School Diploma
source_authority: Georgia State Board of Education / Georgia Department of Education
source_title: State Board of Education Rule 160-4-2-.48: High School Graduation Requirements for Students Enrolling in the Ninth Grade for the First Time in the 2008-09 School Year and Subsequent Years
source_section_or_page: Section (3)(b)(iii) AREAS OF STUDY chart: 'TOTAL UNITS (MINIMUM) 23'
notes: Original source was Cherokee County district (not state authority). Direct GaDOE PDF found and verified. Rule adopted Feb 20, 2020; effective March 11, 2020. PDF last modified Nov 6, 2024.

claim_summary: 4 units English/Language Arts required
source_authority: Georgia State Board of Education / Georgia Department of Education
source_title: State Board of Education Rule 160-4-2-.48
source_section_or_page: Section (3)(b)(iii)(I): 'English/Language Arts* 4' and Section (5)(ii)(I): 'Four units of credit in English language arts shall be required...'
notes: Original data cited district source. Direct GaDOE rule confirms 4 units.

claim_summary: 4 units Mathematics required
source_authority: Georgia State Board of Education / Georgia Department of Education
source_title: State Board of Education Rule 160-4-2-.48
source_section_or_page: Section (3)(b)(iii)(II): 'Mathematics* 4**' and Section (5)(ii)(II): 'Four units of core credit in mathematics shall be required...'
notes: Note: Students with disabilities may complete 3 core math credits via IEP team determination.

claim_summary: 4 units Science required; 4th science may count as elective
source_authority: Georgia State Board of Education / Georgia Department of Education
source_title: State Board of Education Rule 160-4-2-.48
source_section_or_page: Section (3)(b)(iii)(III): 'Science* 4 - The 4th science unit may be used to meet both the science and elective requirement' and Section (5)(ii)(III): 'Four units of credit in science shall be required... The fourth science unit may be used to meet both the science and elective requirements.'
notes: Fourth-science double-count note is explicitly confirmed in rule.

claim_summary: 3 units Social Studies required (1 US History, 1 World History, 0.5 Gov/Civics, 0.5 Economics)
source_authority: Georgia State Board of Education / Georgia Department of Education
source_title: State Board of Education Rule 160-4-2-.48
source_section_or_page: Section (3)(b)(iii)(IV): 'Social Studies* 3' and Section (5)(ii)(IV): 'Three units of credit shall be required in social studies. One unit... US History. One unit... World History. One-half unit... American Government/Civics. One-half unit... Economics.'
notes: Note: Rule uses term 'Social Sciences' in chart but clarifies as 'social studies' in text.

claim_summary: Current data claims 1 unit CTAE + 2 units World Languages = 3 separate requirements. Actual rule: 3 units COMBINED from CTAE and/or Modern Language/Latin and/or Fine Arts.
source_authority: Georgia State Board of Education / Georgia Department of Education
source_title: State Board of Education Rule 160-4-2-.48
source_section_or_page: Section (3)(b)(iii)(V): 'CTAE and/or Modern Language/Latin and/or Fine Arts 3' and Section (5)(ii)(V): 'A total of three units of credit shall be required from the following areas: CTAE and/or Modern Language/Latin and/or Fine Arts.'
notes: CRITICAL: Current data incorrectly splits this into 'World Languages 2' and 'CTAE 1' as separate requirements. The rule states 3 units COMBINED from these areas. Students choose from CTAE, Modern Language/Latin, or Fine Arts for a total of 3 units. No statewide mandate of 2 world languages.

claim_summary: Current data claims 1 unit PE + 0.5 unit Health. Actual rule: 1 unit combined Health and Physical Education.
source_authority: Georgia State Board of Education / Georgia Department of Education
source_title: State Board of Education Rule 160-4-2-.48
source_section_or_page: Section (3)(b)(iii)(VI): 'Health and Physical Education* 1' and Section (5)(ii)(VI): 'One unit of credit in health and physical education is required. Students shall combine one-half or one-third units of credit of Health... to satisfy this requirement.'
notes: CRITICAL: The rule treats Health and PE as a single combined 1-unit requirement. Current dataset splits them into separate rows (PE 1.0, Health 0.5). The note says students may combine 0.5 or 0.33 units to satisfy the 1-unit requirement. JROTC (3 units) may also satisfy this requirement under local board approval.

claim_summary: 4 elective units required
source_authority: Georgia State Board of Education / Georgia Department of Education
source_title: State Board of Education Rule 160-4-2-.48
source_section_or_page: Section (3)(b)(iii)(VII): 'Electives 4'
notes: Confirmed.

claim_summary: Current data claims 0.5 unit Community Service required. Actual rule: NO statewide community service requirement exists.
source_authority: Georgia State Board of Education / Georgia Department of Education
source_title: State Board of Education Rule 160-4-2-.48
source_section_or_page: Entire rule reviewed; no mention of community service requirement. The 0.5 American Government/Civics is part of the 3-unit Social Studies requirement, not a separate community service requirement.
notes: CRITICAL ERROR: The current dataset has a separate 'Civics' 0.5 requirement labeled 'Community Service.' This does NOT exist in Rule 160-4-2-.48. The 0.5 Gov/Civics credit is already accounted for within the 3-unit Social Studies requirement. This row should be deleted.

claim_summary: State assessment requirements referenced in Rule 160-3-1-.07 (Georgia Milestones/EOC)
source_authority: Georgia State Board of Education / Georgia Department of Education
source_title: State Board of Education Rule 160-4-2-.48
source_section_or_page: Section (2)(g): 'Secondary School Credential' references Rule 160-3-1-.07; Section (3)(b)(2): 'assessment requirements specified in Rule 160-3-1-.07'
notes: Confirmed. The diploma requires satisfaction of state assessment requirements in Rule 160-3-1-.07.

claim_summary: 30 credits required for OSSD (17 compulsory + 13 optional for students entering Grade 9 in 2024-25 onwards; 18 + 12 for earlier cohorts)
source_authority: Ontario Ministry of Education
source_title: Ontario Schools, Kindergarten to Grade 12: Policy and Program Requirements (2024 edition), Section 6.1 Ontario Secondary School Diploma
source_section_or_page: Section 6.1: 'Students entering Grade 9 in 2024-25 onwards must earn a minimum of 30 credits, including 17 compulsory credits and 13 optional credits'
notes: Original source was CMEC generic homepage (cmec.ca). This ontario.ca document is the direct Ministry policy. Published 2024.

claim_summary: 40 hours of community involvement activities required
source_authority: Ontario Ministry of Education
source_title: Ontario Schools, Kindergarten to Grade 12: Policy and Program Requirements (2024 edition), Section 6.1.6
source_section_or_page: Section 6.1.6: 'Requires students to complete a minimum of 40 hours of community involvement activities as part of the OSSD requirements' (PPM 124 reference)
notes: Confirmed.

claim_summary: Ontario Secondary School Literacy Test (OSSLT) required
source_authority: Ontario Ministry of Education
source_title: Ontario Schools, Kindergarten to Grade 12: Policy and Program Requirements (2024 edition), Section 6.1.3
source_section_or_page: Section 6.1.3: 'All secondary school students must meet the literacy graduation requirement to earn an OSSD... expected to take and successfully complete the Ontario Secondary School Literacy Test (OSSLT) in Grade 10'
notes: Confirmed.

claim_summary: 2 online learning credits required
source_authority: Ontario Ministry of Education
source_title: Ontario Schools, Kindergarten to Grade 12: Policy and Program Requirements (2024 edition), Section 6.1.7
source_section_or_page: Section 6.1.7 references PPM 167: Online learning graduation requirement; Section 6.1 states 'with at least two of the 30 credits earned online'
notes: Confirmed.

record_name: Council of Ministers of Education, Canada
claim_summary: CMEC is a coordinating body, not a graduation authority. No national Canadian graduation framework exists.
source_authority: Council of Ministers of Education, Canada (CMEC)
source_title: CMEC homepage
source_section_or_page: Generic homepage; no detailed graduation requirements. Canada has no national graduation framework.
notes: Must replace with provincial sources. For Ontario, use https://www.ontario.ca/document/ontario-schools-kindergarten-grade-12-policy-and-program-requirements-2024/diploma-and-certificate-requirements-related-procedures. For other provinces, individual ministry sources needed.

source_authority: Secretaría de Educación Pública (SEP)
source_title: SEP Plan de Estudios para la Educación Secundaria
source_section_or_page: SEP national curriculum page confirms federal-state structure. Also supported by DOF Acuerdo 17/08/22 (MCCEMS) and Acuerdo 444/445.
notes: Current source is SEP generic homepage (gob.mx/sep). Need direct Plan de Estudios page or DOF acuerdo links.

source_authority: Secretaría de Educación Pública (SEP)
source_title: Plan de Estudios para la Educación Secundaria
source_section_or_page: SEP curriculum page confirms lower secondary curriculum structure and free textbooks.

claim_summary: Common curricular framework for upper secondary. General, technological, and professional-tecnica subsystems.
source_authority: Secretaría de Educación Pública (SEP) / Subsecretaría de Educación Media Superior (SEMS)
source_title: ACUERDO número 17/08/22 por el que se establece y regula el Marco Curricular Común de la Educación Media Superior

claim_summary: MCCEMS updated under Nueva Escuela Mexicana (NEM). 200+ technical careers updated with AI, robotics, semiconductors.
source_authority: Secretaría de Educación Pública (SEP) / Subsecretaría de Educación Media Superior (SEMS)
source_title: Modelo Educativo 2025 - Marco Curricular Común de la Educación Media Superior - Sistema Nacional de Bachillerato de la Nueva Escuela Mexicana
source_section_or_page: PDF published by SEP/SEMS, hosted on Jalisco state education portal. 65 pages. Index includes: Fines de la EMS, Perfil de egreso, Enfoque Educativo del MCCEMS 2025, Elementos curriculares, Mallas curriculares, Currículum ampliado.
notes: This is the most current MCCEMS document (2025). Should be added as a new direct source. The original DOF acuerdo 17/08/22 remains the legal instrument; this 2025 PDF is the pedagogical implementation document.

claim_summary: LOMLOE (2020) ESO framework. Compulsory lower secondary grades 7-10. No national leaving exam. Continuous assessment.
source_authority: Jefatura del Estado / Ministerio de Educación y Formación Profesional (MEFP)
source_title: Ley Orgánica 3/2020, de 29 de diciembre, por la que se modifica la Ley Orgánica 2/2006, de 3 de mayo, de Educación (LOMLOE)
source_section_or_page: BOE núm. 340, de 30/12/2020. Entrada en vigor: 19/01/2021. Última actualización: 01/04/2022. Establishes ESO structure (4 courses, compulsory and free, ages 12-16).
notes: Original source was MEFP generic homepage. Direct LOMLOE BOE link found and verified.

claim_summary: ESO curriculum: 4 courses, national minimum curriculum (60% for non-co-official CCAA, 50% for co-official), subjects include Biología y Geología, Educación Física, Geografía e Historia, Lengua Castellana y Literatura, Lengua Extranjera, Matemáticas, etc. 4th course has orientador character.
source_authority: Ministerio de Educación y Formación Profesional (MEFP)
source_title: Real Decreto 217/2022, de 29 de marzo, por el que se establece la ordenación y las enseñanzas mínimas de la Educación Secundaria Obligatoria
source_section_or_page: BOE núm. 76, de 30/03/2022. Artículos 1-20 detail ESO objectives, organization, subjects (Art. 8-9), evaluation (Art. 15-16), promotion (Art. 16), titulation (Art. 17).
notes: Direct BOE source verified and accessible. Art. 13 confirms 60% (non-co-official) / 50% (co-official) minimum state curriculum.

claim_summary: Bachillerato: 2 courses, 4 modalities (Arts, Ciencias y Tecnología, General, Humanidades y Ciencias Sociales). No national leaving exam; continuous assessment. EBAU for university access.
source_authority: Ministerio de Educación y Formación Profesional (MEFP)
source_title: Real Decreto 243/2022, de 5 de abril, por el que se establecen la ordenación y las enseñanzas mínimas del Bachillerato
source_section_or_page: BOE núm. 82, de 06/04/2022. Art. 8: 4 modalities. Art. 9: common subjects. Art. 10-13: specific subjects per modality. Art. 20: continuous evaluation. Art. 22: title requires positive evaluation in all subjects of both courses (exceptional single-subject exemption possible).
notes: Direct BOE source verified and accessible. Also corrected by BOE-A-2022-16754 (14/10/2022).

claim_summary: Mixed national-regional system. MEFP sets national minimum curriculum (50-60%). 17 autonomous communities implement remaining curriculum.
source_authority: Ministerio de Educación y Formación Profesional (MEFP)
source_title: Real Decreto 217/2022, ESO; Real Decreto 243/2022, Bachillerato
source_section_or_page: Art. 13.3 of RD 217/2022: 'Las enseñanzas mínimas... requerirán el 60 por ciento de los horarios escolares para aquellas comunidades autónomas que no tengan lengua cooficial, y el 50 por ciento para las que la tengan.' Art. 18.3 of RD 243/2022: same percentages for Bachillerato.
notes: Confirmed. The 50-60% national minimum / 40-50% autonomous community split is directly supported by the Real Decretos.
